subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a spirit that hath been stirred by the effulgences of the Day of Thy meeting, and this is a lamp that hath been enkindled by the blazing fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا روح اهتز من تجلیات یوم لقائک و هذا سراج اشتعل من النار الموقده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution
